title: Trading bot with 93% win rate
author: Most_Astronomer8375
selftext:
Hello!
I have written a Trading Bot for Trading View that has executed 37 trades in the last 3 months and has a win rate of 93% in the process.

I have to say that the 93% is only
NASDAQ. I have 12 more pairs, where the win rate is about 82%.

Out of 500 trades the bot has a success rate of 77-84% per couple.

The drawdown is very low and the net profit from 01. 06. 24 - 30. 06. 24 only on NASDAQ is 1800$ with a 100% win Rate in 4H chart with
11 trades.

Now I have automated this bot via Pineconnector, so it is now also fully automated on MetaTrader.

The bot mainly runs for indices and also stocks such as Apple, Meta, Microsoft.

It anyone is interested in the code join my free discord server: https://discord.gg/rmeFYaRA
or just text me in Reddit :)

comments.author: jack2060
comments.body: What is the underlying thesis? I also have several bots that look super awesome at first glance :D
